background.finding: No VitaminC/FEVER/RTE/MNLI/SNLI-style file exists in the repository.

stage43b0_artifacts.limitation: File-based only; cannot acquire data, only convert an already-local file.

background.user_clarification: Prior EpistemicBERT/ContraMamba datasets were usually pulled inside Kaggle via `from datasets import load_dataset; dataset = load_dataset(...)`.
background.conclusion: Stage43-B1 adds a HuggingFace acquisition path via datasets.load_dataset so a naturalistic external source can actually be obtained, inspected, and converted into the Stage43 schema.

preferred_acquisition_targets.source: VitaminC or FEVER-style fact verification dataset
preferred_acquisition_targets.rationale: Closest match to ContraMamba's SUPPORT/REFUTE/NOT_ENTITLED schema and to fact-verification framing used elsewhere in the repo.

Weaker NLI transfer probe. RTE's binary entailment/not_entailment labeling does not separate REFUTE from NOT_ENTITLED; not_entailment is mapped to NOT_ENTITLED by default, never REFUTE, unless a manual label map overrides this.
Broader three-way NLI source, useful for volume, but less fact-verification-specific than VitaminC/FEVER; treat as a secondary signal.

loading_pattern.trust_remote_code_note: Only passed to load_dataset when --trust-remote-code is explicitly supplied.

field_detection.no_confident_mapping_behavior: Fails with STAGE43B1_HF_EXTERNAL_ACQUISITION_NO_VALID_ROWS and writes zero accepted rows.

acquisition_script.class_label_resolution: Integer labels resolved to string names via dataset.features[label_field].names when available, before label-string mapping.

label_mapping.not_entailment_policy: Maps to NOT_ENTITLED, not REFUTE, unless --label-map-json overrides. A risk is recorded whenever this rule fires.
label_mapping.manual_override: --label-map-json accepts inline JSON or a file path and fully overrides default mapping when supplied.

acquisition_script.dry_run_flag: --dry-run inspects and reports without writing the accepted output JSONL; rejected JSONL and reports are still written.

stage43b2_evaluation_plan.precondition: A Stage43-B1 acquisition report with decision STAGE43B1_HF_EXTERNAL_ACQUISITION_READY (or an accepted LABEL_IMBALANCED result) must exist first.
stage43b2_evaluation_plan.action: Run the existing external final-composer evaluation on the acquired JSONL only, eval-only.
constraints: Do not modify existing Stage39/40/41/42/43-A/43-B0 reports
Do not modify existing data/probe files
Do not use acquired data for training, calibration, threshold selection, checkpoint selection, or loss design

do_not: run the acquisition script as part of this task
treat RTE not_entailment as REFUTE unless manual label mapping says so
treat synthetic Stage34/35 probes as naturalistic external evidence
alter existing source reports or previous stage outputs

leakage_policy: Any JSONL produced by scripts/acquire_stage43_hf_external_validation.py is external-evaluation-only. It must never be used to update model weights, select checkpoints, tune thresholds, or otherwise influence training or calibration decisions.
recommendation: Run scripts/acquire_stage43_hf_external_validation.py explicitly (not as part of this task) against a VitaminC/FEVER-style dataset first; fall back to RTE/GLUE or MNLI/SNLI only if no fact-verification-specific dataset is accessible. Review the resulting report's risks, rejection_reason_counts, and accepted_label_counts before treating output as ready for Stage43-B2. No model, training, or evaluator code was modified to produce this plan or the acquisition script.
